reviews.author: J. Montgomery
reviews.text: I was having trouble with my washer however I was afraid that the cost repair would be more than I actually paid. Thank God for Appliance Gals! These ladies are AWESOME! I was contacted in a timely fashion, the tech was here in no time.

reviews.author: Burt K.
reviews.text: The Appliance Gals are timely, courteous, fair and very communicative. They can handle even the tough, hard-to-find-parts-for repairs on old stuff, going the extra mile for you!

reviews.author: Heidi L.
reviews.text: What a great experience! So easy to communicate with Eunice, and schedule for a tech to check up on my oven issue. The tech was absolutely wonderful. Quickly diagnosed the issue.

reviews.author: B. Smith
reviews.text: Had The Appliance Gals replace some fixtures on our older, but nice range. Terrific service, flexible, fair, honest, and super professional. Cannot recommend enough.

reviews.author: F. Younginer
reviews.text: I am very pleased with the service I received. I called them on Friday evening and they were able to service me on Saturday. The technician was able to give me a quote ahead of time and the job ended up costing even less as quoted.

reviews.author: W.U.
reviews.text: They were great! Followed through on solving a complex problem. Thoroughly professional and courteous.

reviews.author: R. Beebe
reviews.text: Great experience! Called on a Sunday and was serviced on Tuesday! Thanks appliance gals for getting my dryer back up and running! Gotta go... Laundry time!

reviews.author: L.P.
reviews.text: The Appliance Gals were very informative and punctual. They provided great customer service and the price was reasonable. We would definitely use them again.

counts.aggregate_rating_source: Multi-platform aggregate — no single star aggregate in HTML; site uses 119 Nextdoor mentions and 100% Facebook recommend as trust stats

notes: The Appliance Gals. Eunice handles scheduling (named in review). Atlanta (598 Orchard Court SE). Phone (678) 439-9509. Women-owned appliance repair. 15+ years in business. Trust stats: 119 Nextdoor mentions, 100% Facebook recommend.
